summary: Same JFK clip re-shared by PressSec with a political caption attacking Democrats as 'anti-law enforcement.' The video is grainy fixed-camera security/CCTV footage of an ICE/TSA officer reviving an unresponsive infant at a crowded airport checkpoint, with no graphics, titles, color grading, or music styling. Raw human-interest footage rather than an entertainment/genre-styled produced piece, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: Tweet: 'Democrats are anti-law enforcement... a hero ICE agent jumped into action and restored an infant's breathing'
